content.en:
The Hell Divine Sky Spear stepped from the Dacheng Realm to the Consummation Realm, and the attack power did not rise a little, but a huge transformation, which was enough to double Ye Tian's strength.

Ye Tian was very glad that he was able to cultivate the Hell Divine Void Spear to the consummation realm in this Origin Well, otherwise, if he let him slowly comprehend it himself, although he could also comprehend the Hell Divine Void Spear to the consummation realm, it would definitely take a lot of time, and what he lacked now was time.

"It's a pity that this Origin Well is almost depleted, and there isn't much Origin Well water, otherwise I might be able to cultivate the Wheel of Time, a time great divine power, to the Perfection Realm, or raise the Chaos Dao Realm to a small level!"

Ye Tian sighed slightly, in fact, he was still very satisfied in his heart, after all, this opportunity was enough for him to save years of hard work, which was a big opportunity.

Immediately, his eyes were fixed on this well of origin, and he fell silently into deep thought.

This Origin Well is no longer out of Origin Well Water, and maybe after a long time, some Origin Well Water will accumulate here, but it will definitely be useless to him at that time, and he may not be able to enter here in the future.

Moreover, the Dual Universe Transcendence Plan is being executed, and if it is really successfully executed, the two universes will collide, either evolve or completely perish, so this Origin Well is really of no value to him.

"Let's destroy this Well of Origin, the material of this Well of Origin is very special, maybe it has some value, and a broken Well of Origin may be able to exchange for something good!"

Immediately, Ye Tian began to bombard the Well of Origin.

If it was a complete Origin Well, he would never be able to shatter it, but this Origin Well was already covered with a large number of cracks, and it was obviously on the verge of shattering.

Therefore, he has the hope of shattering this Well of Origin.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian's Chaos Avenue turned into an ancient well, blessed on his body, the Chaos God and Demon Statue, a chaotic true technique, unfolded, and the two fists seemed to have turned into a fist of gods and demons, constantly bombarding this Origin Well.

At the same time, the third form of Tiangang's battle method was also blessed on his body, constantly increasing his own strength, and the god-level extreme strength talent was naturally opened.

It can be said that it is most appropriate for Ye Tian to constantly bombard the Well of Origin in this way, but attacks such as the Hell Divine Sky Spear and the Chaos Sky Knife are of little use.

Because the Hell's Divine Sky Spear is a spatial supernatural power, it is not a pure power attack, and it is difficult to destroy the Well of Origin, while the Chaos Sky Knife condenses the attack in a line, but the effect is not as good as the Chaos God Golem.

Therefore, if you want to blast through the Well of Origin, it is best to attack with pure force, so that you can hope to smash the Well of Origin to pieces.

Click!!

A little bit of debris fell off from the Well of Origin, and the entire Well of Origin kept vibrating, and the cracks naturally increased.

Time passed day by day, Ye Tian continued to bombard the Origin Well, and the huge noise naturally provoked many Source Beasts, but many Source Beasts felt Ye Tian's terrifying aura, and before they could get close to the underground space, they were frightened and fled away.

Their IQ is not high, it does not mean that they are stupid, and they naturally understand that they are not Ye Tian's opponents, and they are looking for death when they come here.

Therefore, Ye Tian's bombardment of the Origin Well was not disturbed by any Source Beast at all, which also made Ye Tian less troublesome.

A year has passed!

"Isn't it shattered yet?"

Ye Tian frowned a little, and was a little anxious in his heart.

He thought that he would soon be able to smash this well of origin, but he didn't expect it to be so difficult, just a little bit, but he always couldn't succeed.

Of course, he also knew that this Well of Origin was completely on the verge of shattering, maybe the next moment, maybe a long time later.

But so far, he naturally doesn't want to give up, otherwise he will give up all his efforts.

Fortunately, his divine power is very strong, almost endless, after all, what he condensed at the beginning was the inner world of the quality of the heavenly realm, no, it should be said that it surpassed the heavenly realm, but the highest level of this universe is only the highest level of the heavenly realm, and no matter how powerful the inner world is, it can only be called the heavenly realm.

And now, the world has turned into a small universe, and it is naturally a small universe of the highest level, the power of the universe is endless, and the divine power of transformation is naturally endless.

Therefore, Ye Tian would hardly be exhausted, otherwise if he were another cosmic god, he would have exhausted his strength and rested.

Another month has passed in the blink of an eye.

On this day, a clattering cracking sound sounded.

Ye Tian didn't care, after all, he had heard such a voice many times.

But this time it's different!

Click! Click! Click!

The continuous cracking sound sounded, what did this mean, Ye Tian didn't have to guess at all.

"The Well of Origin has finally shattered!"

Ye Tian looked at his eyes excitedly, only to see that the huge Origin Well had gradually turned into countless fragments.

The Well of Origin is connected to the Origin Realm, and it cannot be taken away, but now the Well of Origin has turned into countless fragments, which is equivalent to breaking away from the Origin Realm.

Just when Ye Tian was about to collect these fragments of the Origin Well, an accident was discovered.

I saw that the countless fragments of the Origin Well flew towards Ye Tian's Chaos Dao Vision, that is, in the Origin Ancient Well.

This ancient well is not real, it is just an external vision of the realm of Ye Tian Dao.

But now, this ancient well vision is actually absorbing those fragments of the Origin Well, and the dense fragments of the Origin Well are integrated into the ancient well, making this ancient well vision more and more real.

"This ...... What's going on?"

Ye Tian was a little stunned, he didn't know about such a situation at all, because he had never been exposed to such information before.

"Maybe Aurora knows a little bit about the situation!"

Ye Tian guessed.

He didn't stop such a change, at least in the light of the situation, which should be a good thing, not a bad thing.

Perhaps, this is another creation.

Soon, those fragments of the shattered Origin Well were completely integrated into Ye Tian's Ancient Well Vision, making his Ancient Well Vision seem to have turned into a real Origin Well.

Moreover, the origin of the Chaos Dao in the ancient well vision has also undergone a slight change, as if it has become more pure, and there has been a trace of strange changes.

In short, the vision of the ancient well has become more powerful.

Ye Tian experimented with it, and the increase generated by his Chaos Dao power blessing itself was much stronger than before, and the bigger change was in the ancient well vision itself.

Defense!

That's right, the Gujing Vision has a strong defensive power, even beyond Ye Tian's original defensive power.

"Awesome, with this Ancient Well Vision, it will be even more difficult for others to hurt me! Maybe this Ancient Well Vision can also resist the attack of the Heavenly Venerable level!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.
